title: Meeting another parent at school pickup
description: A chat at the school gate — finding out you have a child in the same year

turns.speaker: other
turns.jyutping: nei5 hou2 nei5 hai6 san1 lai4 ge3 gaa1 zoeng2
turns.romanization: Nei⁵ hou²! Nei⁵ hai⁶ san¹ lai⁴ ge³ gaa¹ zoeng²?
turns.english: Hi! Are you a new parent here?

turns.speaker: user
turns.chinese: 係呀，我個仔今年先開始。
turns.jyutping: hai6 aa3 ngo5 go3 zai2 gam1 nin4 sin1 hoi1 ci2
turns.romanization: Hai⁶ aa³, ngo⁵ go³ zai² gam¹ nin⁴ sin¹ hoi¹ ci².
turns.english: Yes, my son just started this year.

turns.speaker: other
turns.chinese: 係咩？我個女都係！讀幾年級？
turns.jyutping: hai6 me1 ngo5 go3 neoi2 dou1 hai6 duk6 gei2 nin4 kap1
turns.romanization: Hai⁶ me¹? Ngo⁵ go³ neoi² dou¹ hai⁶! Duk⁶ gei² nin⁴ kap¹?
turns.english: Really? My daughter too! What year is he in?

turns.speaker: user
turns.jyutping: jat1 nin4 kap1 nei5 go3 neoi2 ne1
turns.romanization: Jat¹ nin⁴ kap¹. Nei⁵ go³ neoi² ne¹?

turns.speaker: other
turns.chinese: 都係一年級！咁係囉，好巧！你叫咩名？
turns.jyutping: dou1 hai6 jat1 nin4 kap1 gam2 hai6 lo3 hou2 hiu2 nei5 giu3 me1 meng2
turns.romanization: Dou¹ hai⁶ jat¹ nin⁴ kap¹! Gam², hai⁶ lo³, hou² hiu²! Nei⁵ giu³ me¹ meng²?
turns.english: Year 1 too! Oh wow, what a coincidence! What's your name?

turns.speaker: user
turns.jyutping: ngo5 hai6 Faith hou2 gou1 hing3 jing6 sik1 nei5
turns.romanization: Ngo⁵ hai⁶ Faith. Hou² gou¹ hing³ jing⁶ sik¹ nei⁵.
turns.english: I'm Faith. Really nice to meet you.

title: Getting a compliment on your Cantonese
description: Someone compliments your Cantonese — how to respond warmly and honestly

turns.speaker: other
turns.jyutping: nei5 gwong2 dung1 waa2 gong2 dak1 hou2 hou2 wo3
turns.romanization: Nei⁵ gwong² dung¹ waa² gong² dak¹ hou² hou² wo³!

turns.speaker: user
turns.jyutping: m4 hai6 zung6 hok6 gan2 do1 ze6 nei5
turns.romanization: M⁴ hai⁶, zung⁶ hok⁶ gan². Do¹ ze⁶ nei⁵.
turns.english: Not really, I'm still learning. Thank you though.

turns.speaker: other
turns.english: How long have you been learning?

turns.speaker: user
turns.jyutping: hok6 zo2 gei2 go3 jyut6 zung6 caa1 dak1 jyun5
turns.romanization: Hok⁶ zo² gei² go³ jyut⁶, zung⁶ caa¹ dak¹ jyun⁵.
turns.english: A few months. I still have a long way to go.

turns.speaker: other
turns.jyutping: gaa1 jau4 gai3 zuk6 nou5 lik6
turns.romanization: Gaa¹ jau⁴! Gai³ zuk⁶ nou⁵ lik⁶!
turns.english: Keep it up! Keep working hard!
